facts: Kumho Tire Co., Inc. has a total of 21,458 bills of lading on file between October 19th, 2012 and July 3rd, 2026.
Recent import activity includes 136 bills of lading within the past 30 days and 410 within the past 90 days.
Kumho Tire USA, Inc. is a primary associated entity with 16,653 total records and 5,551 associations.
Kumho Tire Georgia Inc. is listed as an associated company with 3,785 total records and 95 associations.
KUMHO TIRE USA INC serves as the consignee and notify party for shipments, located at 1001 Summit Boulevard NE Suite 18, Atlanta, GA 30319.
Savannah, Georgia is a key port of unlading for Kumho Tire imports, accounting for 4,543 total records with recent activity as of July 4th, 2026.
Shipments consist of KUMHO brand tires and new tires.
Primary ports of lading include Pusan South Korea (8,242 records), Vung Tau Vietnam (4,067 records), and Kwangyang South Korea (3,150 records).
The company's headquarters address is 15F, 68, Saemunan-ro, Jongno-gu, Seoul, 03184, Korea.
Long Beach, California is another major port of unlading with 6,601 total records.
source_title: KUMHO TIRE CO., INC. | U.S. Import Activity
